items.title: If you want to have good governance, you cannot be in a yes-sir mode: Sashidhar Jagdishan
items.summary: We will convene multiple board meetings over the next month to get the views of all directors on decisions taken over time. We will re-examine them, evaluate the action points and see where we need to improve. This issue was not of our making; it was thrust upon us. We will take stock of past matters and address all issues-existing or new-without hiding anything, says Sashidhar Jagdishan, MD & CEO, HDFC Bank.
